changes: Promoted tested v9.5 beta build into index.html
Added state-aware scenario engine (armCondition, injectCondition, successCondition, failureCondition)
Added trip summary panel with snapshot capture
Added event markers to analysis trend
Added fine-trim governor and AVR nudge controls
Added lower-load control for overcurrent recovery
Added scope-status indicator (OFFLINE / TRACKING / SYNC WINDOW / PARALLEL / TRIPPED)
Hardened overcurrent drill with 3.0 s post-injection stable dwell requirement
Hardened failure semantics to distinguish SUCCESS, FAILED — TIMEOUT, FAILED — TRIP
Added drill-specific blocker guidance during active scenarios
validated_behaviors: State machine and start/reset flows verified
Sync-gating timers integrated into physics loop
Close eligibility gated by dwell timing
Trip snapshot captures dv, df, dphi, current, faults, and scenarioId
All scenarios define armCondition, injectCondition, successCondition, failureCondition
Overcurrent injects only after breaker closure
Overcurrent success requires current < 1400 A for continuous 3.0 s dwell
Scope-status and scenario-state panels render correctly
Failure semantics correctly label SUCCESS, FAILED — TIMEOUT, FAILED — TRIP
Live runtime successfully promoted into index.html
invariants: Core simulator controls unchanged (start, stop, breaker, faults)
Default protection thresholds preserved (ΔV, Δf, Δφ, overcurrent)
Scenarios remain startable, winnable, and single-ending
remaining_risks: Public beta may expose untested scenario edge cases
Mobile layout and readability require broader device validation
Guidance wording may not fully align with operator expectations yet
Replay and debrief interpretation may need refinement under real usage
PHASE-ERR timing window sensitivity may require further tuning
next_actions: Enable GitHub issue templates and Discussions
Triage scenario contradictions and UI clarity issues
Validate mobile behavior across multiple devices
Promote only after validated regression-free pass
notes: v9.5 promoted as public beta runtime. All forward development continues in phoenix_v10_dev.html until next validated promotion.
